name: Reinvent Technology Partners Y (SPAC)
description: Reinvent Technology Partners Y is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded by Reid Hoffman and Mark Pincus to target technology-focused entities. Following its business combination, the company completed a merger with Aurora Innovation, Inc., transitioning from its initial status as a special purpose acquisition company to become part of the continuing entity.
